requires: The SMI requires that conformant management protocols define mechanisms for identifying individual instances of those object types for a particular network element.

mandatory: It is mandatory that all implementations of the SNMP support the five PDUs: GetRequest-PDU, GetNextRequest-PDU, GetResponse-PDU, SetRequest-PDU, and Trap-PDU
Messages which report traps should be received on UDP port 162 for further processing
A protocol entity receives messages at UDP port 161 on the host with which it is associated for all messages except for those which report traps
recommended: it is recommended that SNMP implementations support larger datagrams whenever feasible

4. Protocol Specification -> 4.1. Elemen.data:

    "only at the request of its SNMP application entity": "Mandatory",
    "does not lexicographically precede the name of some object available for get operations in the relevant MIB view, then the receiving entity sends": "Mandatory",

    "cannot be retrieved for reasons not covered by any of the foregoing rules, then the receiving entity sends": "Mandatory",

Mandatory: is generated by a protocol entity only at the request of its SNMP application entity
the receiving protocol entity responds according to any applicable rule in the list below
the receiving entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
the receiving entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
the receiving entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
the receiving entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
the receiving protocol entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
Prohibited: does not exactly match the name of some object available for get operations
cannot be retrieved for reasons not covered by any of the foregoing rules

Mandatory: is generated by a protocol entity only at the request of its SNMP application entity
the receiving entity responds according to any applicable rule in the list below
then the receiving entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
then the receiving entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
then the receiving entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
then the receiving entity sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
then for each object named in the variable-bindings field of the received message, the corresponding value is assigned to the variable
The receiving entity then sends to the originator of the received message the GetResponse-PDU
Prohibited: cannot be altered for reasons not covered by any of the foregoing rules
Recommended: Each variable assignment specified by the SetRequest-PDU should be effected as if simultaneously set with respect to all other assignments specified in the same message
